title: coelogyne pterogyne
intro: Coelogyne pterogyne, commonly known as the 'Pterogyne Coelogyne', is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties and is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. Coelogyne pterogyne is reported to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing stress and promoting relaxation. The plant's bioactive constituents, such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, are thought to be responsible for its therapeutic actions, including its potential as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent.

side_effects: Coelogyne pterogyne can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues due to its potential allergenic compounds.
